originalTitle: The Wegovy pill is still dominating the GLP-1 pill market
summary: It has remained a top choice among Americans trying to lose weight even after the launch of Foundayo, Eli Lilly’s GLP-1 pill.
content: It has remained a top choice among Americans trying to lose weight even after the launch of Foundayo, Eli Lilly’s GLP-1 pill.
chineseTitle: Wegovy 药丸仍主导 GLP-1 药丸市场
chineseSummary: 即使在礼来公司的 GLP-1 药 Foundayo 推出后，它仍然是试图减肥的美国人的首选。
chineseContent: 即使在礼来公司的 GLP-1 药 Foundayo 推出后，它仍然是试图减肥的美国人的首选。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
